import os
import torch
os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
model = torch.nn.Linear(2, 2)
torch.save({'model_state_dict': model.state_dict(), 'policy_type': 'heuristic'}, 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt')
print('Dummy heuristic checkpoint saved to checkpoints/baseline/model.pt')
